---
title: "{{< iconify hugeicons:teacher >}} Teaching Materials"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: projects
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    filter-ui: true
    max-description-length: 300
    page-size: 9
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    image-height: 15em
    feed:
      language: en-gb
    contents:

      - path: https://zamnolence.github.io/_book
        image: assets/images/compsim-blog.png
        title: "R and Python for Computer Simulation"
        description: 'STAT2005 Computer Simulation course notes, slides, and workshop activities'
        date: "2026-04-06"
        categories: [Teaching, Statististics, Computing, R, Python, Undergraduate]

      - path: https://github.com/zamnolence/Economics-at-YSU
        image: assets/images/econ-blog.png
        title: "YSU Economics"
        description: 'Economics lecture slides, workshop activities, and assessments (accessible until 30 June 2025).'
        date: "2025-06-13"
        categories: [Teaching, Finance, Undergraduate]

      - path: assets/media/Calculus_Ref_Sheet.pdf
        image: assets/images/calculus-blog.png
        title: "Calculus Reference Sheet"
        description: 'Printable reference sheet for foundation mathematics and calculus including trignomometric/hyperbolic functions and identities, complex numbers, derivatives, integrals,limit, series test, polynomial approximation, Taylor series, first and second order differential equations, matrix operations, system of linear equations, lines and planes in space, and vector.'
        date: "2025-03-10"
        categories: [Teaching, Mathematics, Calculus, Undergraduate]

      - path: assets/media/Hypothesis_Ref_Sheet.pdf
        image: assets/images/hypothesis-blog.png
        title: "Hypothesis Testing Reference Sheet"
        description: 'Printable reference sheet for hypothesis testing including one-proportion z-test, two-proportion z-test, one-sample t-test, paired t-test, two-sample t-test, F-test, and chi-squared test.'
        date: "2025-05-10"
        categories: [Teaching, Statistics, Undergraduate]

      - path: assets/media/Probability_Ref_Sheet.pdf
        image: assets/images/distributions-blog.png
        title: "Probability Distributions Reference Sheet"
        description: 'Printable reference sheet for standard discrete and continuous probability distributions. This includes description, mean, variance, PMF/PDF, and CDF function for each distribution.'
        date: "2025-05-22"
        categories: [Teaching, Statistics, Undergraduate]

      - path: assets/media/Statistics_Summary_of_Theory.pdf
        image: assets/images/stats-summary-blog.png
        title: "Statistical Probability and Data Analysis"
        description: 'Printable summary sheet  for first-year statistical probability and data analysis course.'
        date: "2025-05-30"
        categories: [Teaching, Statistics, Undergraduate]
---
